round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: No evidence available in Round 1 or Round 2; agent remained silent.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Synthesized cross-agent evidence (Botanics, Meta) to reinforce the initial high-confidence hypothesis.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Synthesized cross-agent evidence (Landscape, Meta) to reinforce the initial high-confidence hypothesis.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Significantly improved by integrating non-regulatory evidence (vegetation, dust) to shift from medium to high confidence.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the unanimous high-confidence evidence from Landscape, Botanics, and Meta. The judge appropriately noted the lack of linguistic evidence and the weak nature of the alternative candidates (South Africa, Botswana) proposed by the Regulatory agent, leading to a correct and well-supported final decision.
